features.name: inout port with conditional tristate driving
features.description: Code should include an inout wire port driven by a conditional expression that assigns high-Z value when not actively driving

features.name: VPI read of actively-driven inout port
features.description: Code should include a testbench using VPI vpi_get_value to read an inout port that is being actively driven by the model (not high-Z)

features.name: VPI write to inout port while model drives it
features.description: Code should include a testbench using VPI vpi_put_value to write an inout port while the simulation model also drives that port
